Title: Requires property/casualty insurance companies to submit information on multifamily housing premiums and claims paid to the department of financial services
Summary: Requires property/casualty insurance companies to submit information on multifamily housing premiums and claims paid to the department of financial services.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the insurance law, in relation to requiring property/casualty insurance companies to submit information on multifamily housing premiums and claims paid to the department of financial services
